mapper.select: SELECT s.*, d.department_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM question q WHERE q.subject_id = s.subject_id) AS question_count FROM subject s LEFT JOIN department d ON s.department_id = d.department_id WHERE s.subject_id = #{subjectId}

SELECT s.*, d.department_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM question q WHERE q.subject_id = s.subject_id) AS question_count FROM subject s LEFT JOIN department d ON s.department_id = d.department_id ORDER BY s.create_time DESC

SELECT s.*, d.department_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM question q WHERE q.subject_id = s.subject_id) AS question_count FROM subject s LEFT JOIN department d ON s.department_id = d.department_id INNER JOIN teacher t ON s.department_id = t.department_id WHERE t.teacher_id = #{teacherId} ORDER BY s.create_time DESC
